messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure SQL to Autonomous Database migration.
Como criar azure database no compartment production?

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-production" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure SQL to Autonomous Database migration.
Como configurar azure database com security hardening?

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-sandbox" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure SQL to Autonomous Database migration.
Como configurar azure database para workloads de Kubernetes?

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-staging" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime
